title: Training Composer 2
summary: Cursor's Composer 2 is built on the Kimi K2.5 base model with continued coding-focused pre-training and long-horizon reinforcement learning. The training pipeline uses reward shaping with nonlinear length penalties and self-summarization to balance speed and depth. Cursor Bench, an internal evaluation using real engineer queries, provides stronger separation between model capabilities than standard benchmarks.
